title: Gaudichaudia ericoides
taxonomy: Gaudichaudia ericoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is native to South America. The classification of Gaudichaudia ericoides is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Polygonales, family Polygonaceae, and genus Gaudichaudia. Gaudichaudia ericoides is further classified into the species Gaudichaudia ericoides. The classification is based on its physical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
